author: Haroen Viaene
subject: docs(site): follow-up improvements  (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#939)
body:
* docs(header): make logo visible and remove community logo

* docs: remove docsearch styles

* docs(style): remove dropdown styles

* docs(reference): generate correct paragraphs

* docs(site): unvendor "headings" plugin

simplify it by using JSDOM, which is already used, so cheerio isn't needed anymore

* docs(site): remove "md" helper

not needed if we put the markdown in the top-level to prevent it being a code block

* docs(site): remove switch/case helpers

not needed with inline template to map from "function"|"module" to "method"
